creator: kenyon@kenyonralph.com
text:
Building audio/gstreamer-plugins-taglib 0.10.16_1,3 fails:

...

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/gstreamer-plugins-taglib.

===>>> make failed for audio/gstreamer-plugins-taglib
===>>> Aborting update

Full portmaster output: http://paste.pocoo.org/show/156644/

How-To-Repeat: On the current ports tree: portmaster -v -D multimedia/gstreamer-plugins-all
